series_metadata.series_description: These files consist of records resulting from filings to the Division pursuant to Ohio Revised Code 1707.04 and 1707.041 regarding entity reorganizations and control bids. The filings may include documents such as: plans for reorganization, recapitalization, or refinancing; prospectuses and brochures; materials relating to "fairness hearings" conducted by the division; general documentation and materials relating to tender offers, control bids, and control share acquisitions; and statements of plans or proposals being made by the offeror.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: hard copy records in office area from date of initial filing, or scanned and verified ; Electronic: Maintain securities machine readable records of database from date of initital filing
